message: Improve Claude plan parsing and tests

files.patch:
@@ -86,7 +86,16 @@ struct StatusProbeTests {

+        Current session
+        10% used
+        Current week (all models)
+        20% used
+        Current week (Opus)
+        30% used
+        \(sample)
+        """
